title: ARCHIVED – Notice - New Interim Federal Health Program Administrator - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Notice - New Interim Federal Health Program Administrator

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
N.B. : Contact information that is inaccurate or no longer in use has been removed from this page.
Modified, January 19, 2011 — In December 2009, Public Works and Government Services Canada awarded a new contract to Medavie Blue Cross for the administration of the Interim Federal Health Program ( IFHP ). This replaces the contract with the current administrator, FAS Benefits Administrators Ltd. ( FAS ) and is effective January 17th, 2011 .
FAS will continue to accept claims from providers until then. All claims after this date must be sent directly to Medavie Blue Cross for processing.
For more information about the Interim Federal Health Program, please consult the IFHP bulletin .
Health service providers, who wish to register with Medavie on or after January 17 th , can also contact the Medavie Blue Cross Customer Information Centre at 1-888-614-1880 or visit Medavie’s website . Prior to January 17, they can email provider@medavie.bluecross.ca .
